name: Light Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine all ingredients except milk. Gradually stir in milk until smooth.
3. Spoon the mixture into the pie shell and bake for 70-80 minutes or until a knife inserted halfway between the center and edge comes out clean.
4. Let cool, then garnish each slice with 2 tablespoons of whipped topping and grated orange peel.
